message:
🌱 Add coredns: CoreDNS pods panic with no probe failures mission (#1595)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "coredns-3860-coredns-pods-panic-with-no-probe-failures",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "coredns: CoreDNS pods panic with no probe failures",
+    "description": "CoreDNS pods panic with no probe failures. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify coredns troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your coredns deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review coredns configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns
kubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns
```
**What happened**:

Recently, we have seen CoreDNS pods panic with no probe failures.  The pod logs show a panic and error yet there are no liveness nor readiness probe failures."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CoreDNS pods panic with no probe failures",
+        "description": "On the surface, it looks like a bug upstream in k8s.io/client-go.

```
W0416 1848.103956       1 reflector.go:326] pkg/mod/k8s.io/client-go.17.2/tools/cache/reflector.go watch of *v1.Endpoints ended with: too old resource version: 3565458375 (3565460029)
```

I'm guessing from the message above,
```yaml
livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 5
      httpGet:
        path: /health
        port: 8080
        scheme: HTTP
      initialDelaySeconds: 60
      periodSeconds: 10
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 5
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade coredns to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade coredns:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade coredns coredns/coredns --namespace coredns
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n coredns
helm list -n coredns
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm CoreDNS pods panic with no probe failures is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns -n coredns --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "On the surface, it looks like a bug upstream in k8s.io/client-go.

```
W0416 1848.103956       1 reflector.go:326] pkg/mod/k8s.io/client-go.17.2/tools/cache/reflector.go watch of *v1.Endpoints ended with: too old resource version: 3565458375 (3565460029)
```

I'm guessing from the message above, that the watch dies, and is not restarted.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "livenessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 5
      httpGet:
        path: /health
        port: 8080
        scheme: HTTP
      initialDelaySeconds: 60
      periodSeconds: 10
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 5",
+        "readinessProbe:
      failureThreshold: 3
      httpGet:
        path: /ready
        port: 8181
        scheme: HTTP
      periodSeconds: 10
      successThreshold: 1
      timeoutSeconds: 1",
+        ".:53 {
        errors
        health {
            lameduck 10s
        }
        ready
        kubernetes cluster.local in-addr.arpa ip6.arpa {
            pods insecure
            fallthrough in-addr.arpa ip6.arpa
            ttl 30
        }
        prometheus :9153
        forward . /etc/resolv.conf
        cache 30
        loop
        reload
        loadbalance
    }"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "coredns",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "coredns"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns/issues/3860",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 34,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with coredns installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:15:52.875Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
